items.title: Austin Laz seeks N2.1 billion in capital raise through private placement or merger
items.summary:
Austin Laz and Company Plc has received shareholder approval to raise up to N2.1 billion in fresh capital through a private placement, business combination, merger, or hybrid of these structures.

items.title: GVCA 2026: Marsha Wulff says Africa’s economic transformation depends on better capital deployment
items.summary: Africa’s next phase of economic transformation will depend less on the availability of capital and more on how effectively that capital is deployed, according to Marsha Wulff, co-founder of Lofty Inc. Capital Management.
